about: Parabola Center is a nonprofit of legal, public health, and policy professionals coming together to put people over profits. Through research and education, we provide everyone with the tools and expertise to shape emerging fields, from marijuana to artificial intelligence.

featuredReport.title: The Illusion of Competition
featuredReport.authors: By Damian Fagon and Hedy Yang
featuredReport.summary: The Illusion of Competition maps every active cannabis brand in Illinois to the parent company that controls it — and finds market concentration rising again. That outcome was produced by policy choices: a licensing framework that gave incumbents a multiyear head start, regulators too fragmented to intervene, and a tax structure that hits small producers hardest.
